scripts.compare: npm run zenstack:generate && npm run zenstack:v2-meta && prisma generate && npm run build-zenstack-schema && npm run build-queries && node ../../dist/cli.js compare --cwd . --queries-module ./.zenstack-compare/out/queries.js --enhance-v2 ./enhance-v2.mjs --enhance-v3 ./enhance-v3.mjs --json
scripts.compare:results: npm run zenstack:generate && npm run zenstack:v2-meta && prisma generate && npm run build-zenstack-schema && npm run build-queries && node ../../dist/cli.js compare --cwd . --queries-module ./.zenstack-compare/out/queries.js --enhance-v2 ./enhance-v2.mjs --enhance-v3 ./enhance-v3.mjs --ignore-sql-diff --json
scripts.compare:report: npm run zenstack:generate && npm run zenstack:v2-meta && prisma generate && npm run build-zenstack-schema && npm run build-queries && node scripts/compare-report.mjs
scripts.demo: npm run extract && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed && npm run compare
scripts.demo:postgres: docker compose up -d postgres && export DATABASE_URL=postgresql://demo:demo@127.0.0.1:5433/zenstack_compare_demo && npm run postgres:wait && npm run extract && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed && npm run compare
scripts.benchmark: npm run zenstack:generate && npm run zenstack:v2-meta && prisma generate && npm run build-zenstack-schema && npm run extract && npm run build-queries && node ../../dist/cli.js benchmark --cwd . --queries-module ./.zenstack-compare/out/queries.js --enhance-v2 ./enhance-v2.mjs --enhance-v3 ./enhance-v3.mjs --query-id-prefix benchmark-queries --query-id-prefix benchmark-scale-queries --warmup 3 --iterations 25 --concurrency 1
scripts.benchmark:concurrent: npm run zenstack:generate && npm run zenstack:v2-meta && prisma generate && npm run build-zenstack-schema && npm run extract && npm run build-queries && node ../../dist/cli.js benchmark --cwd . --queries-module ./.zenstack-compare/out/queries.js --enhance-v2 ./enhance-v2.mjs --enhance-v3 ./enhance-v3.mjs --query-id-prefix benchmark-queries --query-id-prefix benchmark-scale-queries --warmup 2 --iterations 15 --concurrency 8
scripts.benchmark:postgres: docker compose up -d postgres && export DATABASE_URL=postgresql://demo:demo@127.0.0.1:5433/zenstack_compare_demo && npm run postgres:wait && npm run db:push && npm run db:seed && npm run benchmark
scripts.benchmark:pglite: npm run zenstack:generate && npm run zenstack:v2-meta && prisma generate && npm run build-zenstack-schema && npm run extract && npm run build-queries && node scripts/benchmark-pglite.mjs
